title: 11 Years Later, Major Crunchyroll Drama Anime Prepares For Its Finale in September
content: One of the most beloved yet underrated anime series on Crunchyroll, Sound! Euphonium released its anime adaptation in April 2015. The series is based on a novel series written by Ayano Takeda and debuted in 2013.
author: ComicBook

title: Gakuen Sensuikan-tai: Mermaid Girls Manga Ends
content: The May issue of Square Enix 's Big Gangan magazine published the final chapter of Makoto Fukami and artist Seigo Tokiya 's Gakuen Sensuikan-tai: Mermaid Girls ( School Submarine Fleet: Mermaid Girls ) manga on Friday. The fourth and final compiled book volume will ship on June 25.
author: ANN

title: Musawo Launches New Lilimholic Manga
content: This year's combined 22nd and 23rd issue of Kodansha 's Weekly Shōnen Magazine announced on Tuesday that Musawo will debut a new manga titled Lilimholic in the next issue on May 13. Musawo ended the Kareshi Tokidoki Kanojo (My Boyfriend Sometimes is a Girlfriend) manga in October 2024.
author: ANN

title: WEBTOON Partners with Genies to Launch Interactive AI Avatars for Webcomic Characters
content: WEBTOON Entertainment announced on Monday a strategic partnership with Genies to introduce interactive, character-driven digital experiences, marking a new step in the evolution of webcomic storytelling.
author: ANN

title: Every KPop Demon Hunters Animated Short for McDonald’s, Ranked
content: KPop Demon Hunters has recently wrapped a special collaboration with McDonald’s that resulted in some cool animated shorts released a year after the film’s original Netflix debut, so it’s time to rank them all.
author: ComicBook

title: Kadokawa Establishes 'Kadokawa Retail Ventures' Company for N. American Retail Business
content: Kadokawa announced on Monday that it has established a new company named Kadokawa Retail Ventures, LLC in February to take over North American retail business from its Kadokawa World Entertainment (KWE) company.
author: ANN

title: 7 Anime Seasons That Ruined Their Series, Ranked By Terribleness
content: There are some anime franchises out in the wild that have become legendary amongst fans worldwide, but there are some that have been dragged down by individual seasons that failed to live up to other entries.
author: ComicBook

title: K Manga Adds A Sweet Kiss After The Last Train Manga
content: Kodansha 's K MANGA platform announced on Tuesday that it has added Azu Ishida's A Sweet Kiss After the Last Train ( Shūdengo wa Amai Kiss Shite ) manga in English as a simulpub title. The first nine chapters are available now.
author: ANN

title: Real Life Police Force Recreates Anime’s Greatest Moments
content: The anime industry has hit some major heights in recent years, causing the medium to appear in places that fans might not expect. While North American sports teams have collaborated with Jujutsu Kaisen , One Piece , and Dragon Ball , to name a few, Japan still has plenty of crossovers between real-world organizations…
author: ComicBook

title: Major Crunchyroll Dark Fantasy Confirms Season 2 Summer Return With New Trailer
content: One breakout dark fantasy hit is coming back to Crunchyroll later this Summer with a new season, and a cool new trailer and poster are helping to show it off. The Spring 2026 anime schedule is now in gear as fans are getting to watch a ton of major releases now streaming with Crunchyroll, but there are still some big…
author: ComicBook
